rows.desc: Reporting · Campaigns · Catalog · Diagnostics. Real Meta API.

rows.title: Sign in with Meta — no setup
rows.desc: No developer token. No Business Verification. No API key juggling.

rows.title: Works in Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor
rows.desc: Any MCP-compatible AI client at launch. Open beta since Apr 2026.

install.body: Paste this into Claude → Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector. Sign in with your Meta account. Done.

rows.title: vs raw Marketing API
rows.desc: Marketing API needs dev tokens, app review, code. MCP needs a sign-in. That's it.

rows.title: vs third-party tools (Revealbot etc.)
rows.desc: ₹ saved on subscriptions. Talk to your campaigns in plain English instead.

rows.title: vs Meta Ads Manager UI
rows.desc: Bulk edits in seconds. 'Pause anything with ROAS < 1.5'. No UI clicking marathon.

take.use_if: You run Meta Ads (FB + Instagram). You want bulk edits, faster reporting, plain-English audience analysis. Free, official, zero setup.
take.skip_if: You don't run Meta Ads. Or you want one MCP for Meta + Google + TikTok — wait for our Connect (we wire all three through one URL).

more.body: Google Ads MCP · TikTok Ads MCP · LinkedIn Ads. Curated takes on each.

caption_line: Meta Ads via Claude — official MCP. No developer token, no API setup. Sign in with Meta → done. 29 tools live. Comment META for the setup link ↓
